response:
Sure! Here’s a list of ingredients for a basic salad in checkbox format:

- [ ] Lettuce (e.g., romaine, iceberg, or mixed greens)
- [ ] Tomatoes (e.g., cherry or diced)
- [ ] Cucumber
- [ ] Carrots (shredded or sliced)
- [ ] Bell peppers (any color)
- [ ] Red onion (sliced or diced)
- [ ] Radishes (sliced)
- [ ] Avocado (optional)
- [ ] Olive oil (for dressing)
- [ ] Vinegar (e.g., balsamic, red wine, or apple cider)
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Pepper

Feel free to customize it with any additional ingredients you like!
